case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. JOHNSON, PRISCILLA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PRISCILLA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE MORALES, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR RELEASE FROM STAY & FOR JUDGMT FOR IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION PER JUDGE DESMOND, DEPT 2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PRISCILLA MORALES, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY STREET, #220, S.F, CA $435.39 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $435.39, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PRISCILLA MORALES, ROBERT
